skills.name: artifact_schema_profile
skills.description: Build a compact schema and column-level data dictionary for a completed artifact such as CSV, TSV, VCF, GTF, or JSONL.

input_path.description: Path to the completed artifact that should be profiled.

output_json.description: Optional path for the emitted schema JSON report.

sample_rows.description: Number of data rows to sample for type inference.

skills.when_to_use: Use after a run finishes to inspect the exact columns, inferred types, and example values of a data artifact
skills.when_not_to_use: Do not use to execute or modify the scientific workflow itself

skills.name: bash_run
skills.description: Executes a user-approved shell command inside the workspace sandbox. Use this when a specialized skill is not yet available, but a safe command-line step is needed.

working_directory.description: Optional execution directory for the shell command. Must stay inside the selected workspace root.

skills.when_to_use: Use as a last resort when no specialized skill exists for the required single operation
skills.when_not_to_use: Do not use when a dedicated skill wrapper exists or when the workflow needs multiple operations

skills.name: bcftools_call
skills.description: Call variants via bcftools mpileup + call pipeline.

reference_fasta.description: Reference FASTA path.

skills.when_to_use: Use for variant calling via bcftools mpileup+call pipeline on aligned BAM data
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for somatic calling or haplotype-aware germline calling (use GATK or FreeBayes)

skills.name: bcftools_filter_run
skills.description: Filter one VCF with bcftools filter as a single atomic wrapper step.

input_vcf.description: Input VCF or VCF.GZ path to filter.

output_vcf.description: Output filtered VCF or VCF.GZ path.

output_type.description: Output encoding (`v`, `z`, or `b`). Defaults to bgzipped VCF (`z`).

soft_filter_name.description: Optional bcftools filter label to attach to the emitted records.

skills.when_to_use: Use for one deterministic VCF filtering step that keeps only variants matching a bcftools include expression
skills.when_not_to_use: Do not use when the workflow still needs subtraction, normalization, indexing, or CSV export in the same step

skills.name: bcftools_isec_run
skills.description: Perform one bcftools isec set operation as a single atomic wrapper step.

input_vcfs.description: Two or more VCF inputs for bcftools isec.

output_dir.description: Output directory where bcftools isec writes numbered VCF results.

output_vcf.description: Optional stable named VCF copied from the first numbered isec result.

min_matches.description: Minimum matching input count for intersection mode.

skills.when_to_use: Use for one deterministic intersection, complement, or private-variant operation across multiple VCF inputs
skills.when_not_to_use: Do not use when the workflow still needs additional normalization or CSV export in the same step

skills.name: bcftools_norm_run
skills.description: Normalize or atomize one VCF with bcftools norm as a single atomic wrapper step.

input_vcf.description: Input VCF or VCF.GZ path to normalize.

reference_fasta.description: Reference FASTA used by bcftools norm.

output_vcf.description: Output normalized VCF or VCF.GZ path.

multiallelic_mode.description: Optional bcftools norm multiallelic mode (`+any`, `-any`, or `none` to omit `-m`).

skills.when_to_use: Use for one VCF normalization step that needs a reference FASTA and a deterministic output path
skills.when_not_to_use: Do not use for multi-operation shell chains that also index, intersect, or export downstream summaries

skills.name: bedtools_coverage
skills.description: Summarize interval coverage or overlap counts with bedtools coverage.

a_intervals.description: BED or interval file supplied as -a.

b_features.description: BED, BEDGRAPH, or BAM-derived feature file supplied as -b.

output_tsv.description: Output path for the coverage summary.

counts_only.description: Emit only the overlap count per A interval.

split_alignments.description: Treat split BAM or BED12 alignments as distinct blocks.

sorted_input.description: Whether both inputs are already coordinate-sorted.

skills.when_to_use: Use for deterministic interval coverage summaries against BED, BEDGRAPH, or BAM-derived features
skills.when_not_to_use: Do not use for BAM QC text summaries such as flagstat or idxstats

skills.name: bedtools_genomecov
skills.description: Generate genome coverage profiles with bedtools genomecov from BAM or interval inputs.

input_bam.description: Optional BAM or CRAM input for genomecov -ibam mode.

input_bed.description: Optional BED or interval input for genomecov -i mode.

genome_file.description: Genome sizes file required when input_bed is used.

output_file.description: Output path for the coverage profile.

report_mode.description: Coverage reporting mode (bedgraph, bedgraph_all, histogram, per_base).

split_intervals.description: Treat split alignments or BED12 blocks as distinct intervals.

skills.when_to_use: Use for deterministic coverage track generation or depth profiling across a genome
skills.when_not_to_use: Do not use for simple overlap counts between two BED files or for BAM QC text summaries

skills.name: bedtools_intersect
skills.description: Intersect two genomic interval sets with bedtools and write the overlap result.

a_intervals.description: Primary BED or interval file supplied as -a.

b_intervals.description: Secondary BED or interval file supplied as -b.

output_file.description: Output path for the intersect result.

report_mode.description: Optional bedtools intersect reporting mode (default, wa, wb, wawb, wao, loj, u, v, c).

sorted_input.description: Whether the input interval files are already coordinate-sorted.

min_overlap_fraction.description: Optional minimum fraction of A that must overlap B.

require_reciprocal_overlap.description: Require reciprocal overlap when min_overlap_fraction is provided.

skills.when_to_use: Use for deterministic overlap operations between two BED or interval-like files
skills.when_not_to_use: Do not use for BAM alignment QC summaries or for non-genomic tabular joins

skills.name: blast_formatter_run
skills.description: Format a BLAST archive file into tabular, XML, or HTML output.

archive_file.description: BLAST archive file produced with outfmt 11.

skills.when_to_use: Use after a BLAST run when archive output needs to be reformatted for downstream use or reporting
skills.when_not_to_use: Do not use to execute a BLAST search itself

skills.name: blastdb_aliastool_run
skills.description: Create an alias BLAST database from one or more existing BLAST databases.

dblist.description: One or more BLAST database prefixes to alias.

skills.when_to_use: Use to aggregate or relabel one or more BLAST databases into a reusable alias database
skills.when_not_to_use: Do not use to build a primary BLAST database from FASTA input

skills.name: blastdbcheck_run
skills.description: Verify integrity of a BLAST database or BLAST database directory.

database.description: BLAST database name or path prefix.

skills.when_to_use: Use after BLAST database creation or before downstream search execution to verify integrity
skills.when_not_to_use: Do not use to execute searches or retrieve entries

skills.name: blastdbcmd_run
skills.description: Retrieve sequences or metadata from a BLAST database.

database.description: BLAST database name or path prefix.

info.description: Emit database info instead of entries.

skills.when_to_use: Use to inspect BLAST database contents, retrieve entries, or print database metadata
skills.when_not_to_use: Do not use to execute sequence similarity searches

skills.name: blastn_search
skills.description: Run BLASTN nucleotide homology search and emit tabular hits.

database.description: BLAST nucleotide database name/path or subject FASTA.

task.description: Optional BLASTN task such as megablast or blastn-short.

skills.when_to_use: Use for nucleotide sequence similarity searches against a nucleotide database
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for protein searches (use blastp) or translated searches (use blastx/tblastn)

skills.name: blastp_search
skills.description: Run BLASTP protein homology search and emit tabular hits.
skills.when_to_use: Use for protein sequence similarity searches against a protein database
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for nucleotide searches (use blastn) or translated searches (use blastx/tblastn)

skills.name: blastx_search
skills.description: Run BLASTX translated nucleotide-to-protein search and emit tabular hits.

database.description: BLAST protein database name/path or subject FASTA.

query_gencode.description: Optional genetic code for query translation.

skills.when_to_use: Use when nucleotide queries need to be searched against protein databases
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for direct protein-vs-protein searches (use blastp) or nucleotide-vs-nucleotide searches (use blastn)

skills.name: bowtie2_align
skills.description: Align short-read DNA sequencing reads with Bowtie2 and produce indexed BAM output.

reference_fasta.description: Reference FASTA used to build Bowtie2 index when needed.

cache_index_base.description: Optional shared index base for reusable Bowtie2 index artifacts.

skills.when_to_use: Use for short-read alignment when BWA is unavailable or for gapped alignment to a reference
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for spliced RNA-seq alignment (use STAR/HISAT2) or long reads (use minimap2)

skills.name: bwa_mem_align
skills.description: Align short-read DNA sequencing reads with BWA-MEM and produce indexed BAM output.

reference_fasta.description: Reference FASTA for BWA indexing/alignment.

cache_index_prefix.description: Optional shared index prefix path for cached BWA index files.

postprocess_mode.description: Optional deterministic postprocessing mode, for example fixmate_markdup_q20.

output_unmapped_bam.description: Optional BAM path for unmapped reads emitted by supported postprocessing modes.

read_group.description: Optional explicit read-group string passed to BWA-MEM.

sample_name.description: Optional sample name used to derive the read-group when one is not provided directly.

skills.when_to_use: Use for short-read DNA alignment to a reference genome with BWA-MEM2
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for spliced alignment (use STAR/HISAT2) or long reads (use minimap2)

skills.name: cellranger_count
skills.description: Run 10x Cell Ranger gene-expression counting pipeline.
skills.when_to_use: Use for 10x Genomics single-cell RNA-seq counting from raw FASTQ data
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for non-10x data or pre-processed h5ad files (use scanpy/seurat)

skills.name: cnv_cnvkit_style
skills.description: Run CNVkit-style copy-number analysis with deterministic fallback behavior.

reference_fasta.description: Reference FASTA path.

skills.when_to_use: Use for copy number variation detection from WGS or targeted sequencing BAM data
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for SNP/indel calling or structural variant detection

skills.name: cutadapt_run
skills.description: Trim sequencing adapters from FASTQ reads with Cutadapt.

reads_2.description: Optional Read 2 FASTQ(.gz) input for paired-end trimming.

output_reads_2.description: Optional trimmed Read 2 FASTQ(.gz) output path for paired-end trimming.

adapter_3prime_r1.description: One or more 3-prime adapter sequences for Read 1.

adapter_3prime_r2.description: One or more 3-prime adapter sequences for Read 2.

minimum_length.description: Minimum retained read length after trimming.

quality_cutoff.description: Optional quality cutoff argument passed to Cutadapt, for example 20 or 20,20.

threads.description: Number of CPU cores for Cutadapt.

discard_untrimmed.description: Discard reads where no adapter match is found.

skills.when_to_use: Use when explicit adapter trimming is needed before alignment, quantification, or downstream read processing
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for read quality assessment alone (use FastQC) or when no adapter trimming is required

skills.name: deltablast_search
skills.description: Run DELTA-BLAST protein search and emit tabular hits.

database.description: Protein BLAST database name/path or subject FASTA.

domain_database.description: Optional RPS domain database path for conserved-domain seeding.

skills.when_to_use: Use for domain-seeded protein homology searches when a conserved-domain database is available
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for direct nucleotide searches or when no conserved-domain database is available

skills.name: deseq2_run
skills.description: Run DESeq2 differential expression from count matrix + sample metadata.

script_path.description: Path to DESeq2 wrapper R script.

engine.description: Optional implementation engine. Use `pydeseq2` to run the bundled Python backend instead of the default R/DESeq2 wrapper.

skills.when_to_use: Use for differential gene expression analysis with DESeq2 from a counts matrix
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for transcript-level DE (use Sleuth) or when sample size < 3 per group

skills.name: dexseq_run
skills.description: Run exon-level differential usage analysis via a DEXSeq-compatible Rscript interface.
skills.when_to_use: Use for differential exon usage analysis in RNA-seq data
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for gene-level differential expression (use DESeq2/edgeR/limma)

skills.name: edger_run
skills.description: Run edgeR GLM differential expression from counts and metadata.

script_path.description: Path to edgeR wrapper R script.

skills.when_to_use: Use for differential gene expression with edgeR, alternative to DESeq2
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for transcript-level quantification; DESeq2 may be preferred for small samples

skills.name: fallback_skill_builder
skills.description: Build and maintain deterministic fallback pipeline skills/templates with inventory-driven reuse/extend/create selection, optional multi-template composition for multi-domain contracts, preflight safety checks, contract validation, and artifact-driven troubleshooting/retry loops.

target_capability_set.description: Comma-separated required capabilities for the fallback contract.

allowed_tools.description: Comma-separated tools/wrappers allowed for generated fallback plans.

data_reference_constraints.description: JSON object with required paths/references and optional controls.

request_text.description: Optional free text used for capability/tool inference.

out_json.description: Output path for builder audit/report JSON.

skills.when_to_use: Use as internal meta-skill for generating pipeline plans when no dedicated skill exists
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for direct use in analysis plans; used internally by the system

skills.name: fastp_run
skills.description: Trim adapters and low-quality bases from FASTQ reads with fastp.

reads_2.description: Optional Read 2 FASTQ(.gz) input for paired-end trimming.

output_reads_2.description: Optional trimmed Read 2 FASTQ(.gz) output path for paired-end trimming.

adapter_sequence.description: Optional explicit adapter sequence for Read 1.

adapter_sequence_r2.description: Optional explicit adapter sequence for Read 2.

cut_front.description: Trim low-quality bases from the front of reads.

cut_tail.description: Trim low-quality bases from the tail of reads.

cut_right.description: Trim low-quality tails using the sliding-window right-cut mode.

correction.description: Enable overlap-based base correction for paired-end reads.

cut_mean_quality.description: Mean quality threshold for quality trimming.

length_required.description: Minimum retained read length after trimming.

threads.description: Number of CPU threads for fastp.

skills.when_to_use: Use for general-purpose read preprocessing when adapter trimming or quality filtering is needed before downstream analysis
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for read quality assessment alone (use FastQC) or when RNA-specific adapter trimming should be handled with Cutadapt

skills.name: fastqc_run
skills.description: Performs quality control on raw sequencing data (FASTQ files) using FastQC.

input_file.description: Path to the input FASTQ file(s). Can be a single file or a space-separated list of files.

threads.description: Number of threads to use. Defaults to 2.

contaminants.description: An optional file containing a list of contaminants to screen against.

casava.description: Files come from raw Casava 1.8 or later output, so only the first in a pair is checked for Ns.

skills.when_to_use: Use for quality control assessment of raw FASTQ sequencing data before processing
skills.when_not_to_use: Not a processing step; does not filter or trim reads (use fastp/trimmomatic)

skills.name: featurecounts_run
skills.description: Quantify aligned reads to genes/exons using featureCounts.

annotation_format.description: Optional annotation format override such as `GFF` when the annotation file is not GTF.

feature_type.description: Optional feature type to count, for example `gene` when using GFF annotations.

attribute_type.description: Optional GFF/GTF attribute to aggregate counts by, such as `ID` or `gene_id`.

is_paired_end.description: Treat the BAM inputs as paired-end and pass `-p` to featureCounts.

count_read_pairs.description: When paired-end counting is enabled, count read pairs instead of individual reads.

skills.when_to_use: Use for gene-level read counting from aligned BAM files using a GTF/GFF annotation
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for transcript-level quantification (use salmon/kallisto)

skills.name: flye_assemble
skills.description: Assemble long reads with Flye.

read_mode.description: Flye read mode such as nano-raw, nano-hq, pacbio-raw, or pacbio-hifi.

meta_mode.description: Enable Flye metagenome mode for mixed-community long-read assembly.

skills.when_to_use: Use for de novo assembly of long reads (PacBio/Nanopore)
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for short-read assembly (use SPAdes) or hybrid assembly

skills.name: freebayes_call
skills.description: Call variants with haplotype-based FreeBayes.

reference_fasta.description: Reference FASTA path.

ploidy.description: Optional organism ploidy passed to FreeBayes with -p.

skills.when_to_use: Use for haplotype-based variant calling from aligned BAM data
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for somatic variant calling (use Mutect2) or large cohorts (use GATK)

skills.name: fusion_star_fusion_style
skills.description: Run STAR-Fusion-style fusion transcript detection with deterministic fallback output.
skills.when_to_use: Use for detecting gene fusions from RNA-seq data using STAR-Fusion
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for general RNA-seq alignment or gene expression analysis

skills.name: gatk_haplotypecaller
skills.description: Call germline SNPs/indels with GATK HaplotypeCaller.

reference_fasta.description: Reference FASTA.

skills.when_to_use: Use for germline SNP/indel calling with GATK best practices pipeline
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for somatic calling (use Mutect2) or bacterial genomes (use FreeBayes/bcftools)

skills.name: gatk_mutect2_call
skills.description: Call somatic variants with GATK Mutect2 (tumor-only or tumor-normal mode).

reference_fasta.description: Reference FASTA path.

skills.when_to_use: Use for somatic variant calling from tumor/normal paired samples
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for germline calling (use HaplotypeCaller) or bacterial genomes

skills.name: hisat2_align
skills.description: Align reads to genome/transcriptome using HISAT2.

reference_fasta.description: Optional FASTA used to build index if index files are missing.

skills.when_to_use: Use for splice-aware RNA-seq alignment as an alternative to STAR
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for DNA-seq alignment (use BWA/bowtie2) or long reads (use minimap2)

skills.name: hmmscan_search
skills.description: Run HMMER hmmscan for protein domain annotation against an HMM database.
skills.when_to_use: Use for protein domain searches against HMM profile databases (Pfam, TIGRFAM)
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for sequence similarity (use BLAST) or gene prediction

skills.name: immune_repertoire_mixcr_style
skills.description: Run MiXCR-style immune repertoire profiling with deterministic fallback output.
skills.when_to_use: Use for immune receptor repertoire analysis (TCR/BCR) from sequencing data
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for general RNA-seq or non-immune sequencing data

skills.name: kallisto_quant
skills.description: Quantify transcript abundance with kallisto pseudoalignment.

transcriptome_fasta.description: Optional transcriptome FASTA used to build the index when it does not already exist.

skills.when_to_use: Use for fast transcript-level quantification as an alternative to Salmon
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for genome-level alignment or gene-level counting (use featureCounts)

skills.name: limma_voom_run
skills.description: Run limma-voom differential expression analysis from counts and metadata.
skills.when_to_use: Use for differential expression with limma-voom, good for complex designs
skills.when_not_to_use: Use DESeq2 for simpler two-group comparisons with small sample sizes

skills.name: macs2_atacseq_callpeak
skills.description: Call ATAC-seq accessibility peaks with MACS2/3 tuned flags.
skills.when_to_use: Use for ATAC-seq peak calling to identify open chromatin regions
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for ChIP-seq (use macs2_chipseq_callpeak) or RNA-seq analysis

skills.name: macs2_chipseq_callpeak
skills.description: Call ChIP-seq peaks with MACS2/3 callpeak mode.
skills.when_to_use: Use for ChIP-seq peak calling to identify protein-DNA binding sites
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for ATAC-seq (use macs2_atacseq_callpeak) or RNA-seq analysis

skills.name: mafft_align
skills.description: Align multiple nucleotide or protein sequences with MAFFT.

input_fasta.description: Input FASTA with two or more sequences to align.

strategy_mode.description: MAFFT strategy mode (auto, localpair, globalpair, genafpair).

skills.when_to_use: Use for deterministic multiple-sequence alignment before phylogenetic inference
skills.when_not_to_use: Do not use as the tree inference step itself or for general shell execution

skills.name: majiq_run
skills.description: Build splice graphs and run MAJIQ deltapsi comparison for two sample groups.

group1_bams.description: Group 1 BAM path(s) or list token.

group2_bams.description: Group 2 BAM path(s) or list token.

skills.when_to_use: Use for local splicing variation analysis in RNA-seq data
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for differential gene expression (use DESeq2) or exon usage (use DEXSeq)

skills.name: makeblastdb_run
skills.description: Build a nucleotide or protein BLAST database from a FASTA file.

input_fasta.description: FASTA input to convert into a BLAST database.

dbtype.description: BLAST database type, either prot or nucl.

parse_seqids.description: Enable sequence identifier parsing in the generated database.

skills.when_to_use: Use to build a reusable BLAST database from a FASTA file before running BLAST searches
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for executing a search itself

skills.name: makeprofiledb_run
skills.description: Build an RPS, DELTA, or COBALT profile database for domain-aware BLAST workflows.

input_list.description: File listing scoremat or PSSM files.

skills.when_to_use: Use to prepare profile databases required by RPS-BLAST, RPSTBLASTN, or DELTA-BLAST
skills.when_not_to_use: Do not use for ordinary nucleotide or protein FASTA databases; use makeblastdb_run instead

skills.name: metabolomics_diff_abundance
skills.description: Run deterministic differential metabolite-feature abundance analysis from a processed feature table and sample metadata.

feature_table.description: Metabolomics feature-intensity matrix in wide sample-column format.

metadata_table.description: Sample metadata table describing group assignments.

script_path.description: Optional path to a custom metabolomics workflow script. Defaults to the bundled deterministic workflow.

output_dir.description: Output directory for canonical metabolomics result artifacts.

output_csv.description: Optional explicit path for the differential-abundance CSV.

sample_id_column.description: Optional explicit sample-ID column name in the metadata table.

group_column.description: Optional explicit grouping column in the metadata table.

normalization_method.description: Deterministic normalization method. Currently only median_center is supported.

min_present_fraction.description: Minimum observed fraction required to retain one feature before imputation.

skills.when_to_use: Use for table-first metabolomics inputs with one feature-intensity matrix and one sample metadata table.
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for raw LC-MS peak detection, mzML preprocessing, or spectral annotation workflows.

skills.name: metagenomics_kraken2_bracken_style
skills.description: Run Kraken2/Bracken-style metagenomics profiling with deterministic fallback output when tools are missing.

reference_fasta.description: Optional reference FASTA used to build a tiny Kraken2 database or regenerate Bracken support files.

taxonomy_names.description: Optional taxonomy names.dmp file used when building a database.

taxonomy_nodes.description: Optional taxonomy nodes.dmp file used when building a database.

threshold.description: Minimum read threshold passed to Bracken abundance estimation.

taxonomy_level.description: Taxonomic level passed to Bracken abundance estimation, for example S or G.

skills.when_to_use: Use for taxonomic classification of metagenomic reads with Kraken2+Bracken
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for functional annotation or viral metagenomics assembly

skills.name: methylation_bismark_style
skills.description: Run Bismark-style bisulfite methylation analysis with deterministic degrade behavior when the binary is unavailable.
skills.when_to_use: Use for bisulfite sequencing methylation analysis with Bismark
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for general DNA-seq alignment or RNA-seq analysis

skills.name: minimap2_align
skills.description: Align long-read (or mixed) sequencing reads with minimap2 and produce indexed BAM output.

reference_fasta.description: Reference FASTA path.

reads.description: FASTQ path for single-file long-read input.

preset.description: Minimap2 preset (for example splice, map-ont, map-pb).

skills.when_to_use: Use for long-read alignment (PacBio/Nanopore) or fast approximate alignment
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for short-read DNA (use BWA) or spliced RNA-seq alignment (use STAR)

skills.name: multiqc_report
skills.description: Build a researcher-facing run report bundle and aggregate discovered QC outputs with MultiQC when the binary is installed.

run_input.description: Completed selected-dir path, result.json path, or a directory of QC artifacts.

output_dir.description: Optional output directory for the generated report bundle.

skills.when_to_use: Use after a run completes to build a shareable report bundle with MultiQC aggregation
skills.when_not_to_use: Do not use for primary analysis execution or when no completed run directory exists

skills.name: phylogenetics_iqtree_style
skills.description: Run IQ-TREE-style phylogenetic inference with deterministic fallback tree generation.
skills.when_to_use: Use for maximum-likelihood phylogenetic tree inference from aligned sequences
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for sequence alignment (use MAFFT) or distance-based trees

skills.name: prodigal_annotate
skills.description: Predict bacterial genes from an assembled genome with Prodigal.

output_gff.description: Output gene predictions in GFF format.

output_faa.description: Output translated protein sequences in FASTA format.

mode.description: Prodigal mode: auto, single, or meta. Auto uses meta for short assemblies that cannot train single-genome models.

require_cds.description: Fail the wrapper when Prodigal emits no CDS/protein predictions.

skills.when_to_use: Use for prokaryotic gene prediction from assembled genomes
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for eukaryotic gene prediction or full functional annotation (use Prokka)

skills.name: prokka_annotate
skills.description: Annotate prokaryotic assemblies with Prokka.

cpus.description: Optional thread count passed to Prokka.

kingdom.description: Optional Prokka kingdom label, such as Bacteria or Archaea.

genus.description: Optional genus name used for annotation metadata.

species.description: Optional species name used for annotation metadata.

strain.description: Optional strain name used for annotation metadata.

locustag.description: Optional locus tag prefix passed to Prokka.

skills.when_to_use: Use for rapid prokaryotic genome annotation (gene prediction + functional annotation)
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for eukaryotic genomes or metagenome annotation

skills.name: proteomics_diff_abundance
skills.description: Run deterministic differential protein abundance analysis from a processed abundance table and sample metadata.

abundance_matrix.description: Protein abundance matrix in wide sample-column format.

metadata_table.description: Sample metadata table describing group assignments.

script_path.description: Optional path to a custom proteomics workflow script. Defaults to the bundled deterministic workflow.

output_dir.description: Output directory for canonical proteomics result artifacts.

output_csv.description: Optional explicit path for the differential-abundance CSV.

sample_id_column.description: Optional explicit sample-ID column name in the metadata table.

group_column.description: Optional explicit grouping column in the metadata table.

normalization_method.description: Deterministic normalization method. Currently only median_center is supported.

min_present_fraction.description: Minimum observed fraction required to retain one protein before imputation.

skills.when_to_use: Use for table-first proteomics inputs with one protein abundance matrix and one sample metadata table.
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for raw mzML processing, peptide-spectrum matching, or sequence-level protein annotation workflows.

skills.name: psiblast_search
skills.description: Run PSI-BLAST iterative protein-to-protein search and emit tabular hits.

database.description: Protein BLAST database name/path or subject FASTA.

skills.when_to_use: Use for iterative protein homology searches when standard BLASTP sensitivity is not enough
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for nucleotide queries or when a single-pass protein search is sufficient

skills.name: quarto_report
skills.description: Build a researcher-facing run report bundle and render the generated Quarto document when Quarto is available.

run_input.description: Completed selected-dir path or result.json path.

output_dir.description: Optional output directory for the generated report bundle.

skills.when_to_use: Use after a run completes to render a polished Quarto report from the generated run bundle
skills.when_not_to_use: Do not use before the run is complete or as a substitute for the core analysis workflow

skills.name: rmats_run
skills.description: Run rMATS alternative splicing analysis for two BAM groups using an annotation GTF.

group1_bams.description: Group 1 BAM path(s), as a comma-separated string or JSON-style list.

group2_bams.description: Group 2 BAM path(s), as a comma-separated string or JSON-style list.

output_dir.description: Output directory for rMATS result tables.

read_length.description: Read length used by rMATS. Defaults to 100.

skills.when_to_use: Use for differential alternative splicing analysis between conditions in RNA-seq
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for gene-level differential expression (use DESeq2)

skills.name: rpsblast_search
skills.description: Run RPS-BLAST protein-to-domain search and emit tabular hits.
skills.when_to_use: Use to search protein queries against a conserved-domain or profile BLAST database
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for ordinary protein databases built with makeblastdb

skills.name: rpstblastn_search
skills.description: Run RPSTBLASTN translated nucleotide-to-domain search and emit tabular hits.
skills.when_to_use: Use when nucleotide queries need to be translated and searched against a conserved-domain or profile BLAST database
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for ordinary nucleotide or protein databases built with makeblastdb

skills.name: salmon_quant
skills.description: Quantify transcript abundance with Salmon quasi-mapping.

transcriptome_fasta.description: Optional transcriptome FASTA used to build the index when it does not already exist.

skills.when_to_use: Use for fast transcript-level quantification via quasi-mapping in RNA-seq
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for genome-level alignment or gene counting (use featureCounts/STAR)

skills.name: samtools_flagstat
skills.description: Compute alignment summary counts from BAM or CRAM with samtools flagstat.

output_txt.description: Output path for the flagstat report.

skills.when_to_use: Use for deterministic alignment QC summaries such as mapped, paired, duplicate, and properly paired counts
skills.when_not_to_use: Do not use for per-reference counts (use samtools_idxstats) or full detailed metrics (use samtools_stats)

skills.name: samtools_idxstats
skills.description: Report per-reference mapped and unmapped read counts with samtools idxstats.

output_tsv.description: Output path for the idxstats table.

skills.when_to_use: Use for deterministic per-contig alignment count summaries from indexed BAM or CRAM files
skills.when_not_to_use: Do not use for aggregate mapping summaries (use samtools_flagstat) or full statistics (use samtools_stats)

skills.name: samtools_stats
skills.description: Compute detailed alignment statistics from BAM or CRAM with samtools stats.

output_txt.description: Output path for the samtools stats report.

reference_fasta.description: Optional reference FASTA for CRAM-aware statistics.

skills.when_to_use: Use for deterministic detailed alignment QC metrics beyond flagstat or idxstats
skills.when_not_to_use: Do not use for interval overlap operations or lightweight mapped-read counts alone

skills.name: sc_count_and_cluster
skills.description: Single-cell RNA-seq pipeline from 10x FASTQs to clusters via kmer counting + scanpy.

whitelist.description: Optional barcode whitelist file. When omitted, the wrapper infers one from observed R1 barcodes.

min_genes.description: Minimum genes per cell for QC.

min_cells.description: Minimum cells per gene for QC.

skills.when_to_use: Use for single-cell counting and clustering with STARsolo or equivalent
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for bulk RNA-seq or pre-processed h5ad files

skills.name: scanpy_workflow
skills.description: Run a deterministic Scanpy preprocessing and clustering workflow on pre-counted single-cell input.

input_path.description: Input single-cell dataset path (h5ad, loom, 10x h5, or 10x MTX directory).

script_path.description: Optional path to a custom scanpy workflow script. Defaults to the bundled deterministic workflow.

min_genes.description: Minimum genes detected per cell during QC filtering.

min_cells.description: Minimum cells expressing a gene during QC filtering.

max_mito_pct.description: Maximum mitochondrial read percentage allowed per cell.

n_hvgs.description: Number of highly variable genes to retain before PCA/clustering.

leiden_resolution.description: Leiden resolution parameter for cluster granularity.

skills.when_to_use: Use for single-cell RNA-seq analysis with scanpy (Python-based preprocessing/clustering)
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for bulk RNA-seq or when R/Seurat workflow is preferred

skills.name: seurat_rscript_workflow
skills.description: Run Seurat workflow from an Rscript wrapper for CLI orchestration.
skills.when_to_use: Use for single-cell RNA-seq analysis with Seurat in R
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for Python-based analysis (use scanpy) or bulk RNA-seq

skills.name: shared_variants_export_run
skills.description: Export shared annotated variants from two VCF inputs to CSV as one atomic helper-backed step.

input_vcf_a.description: First annotated or normalized VCF input.

input_vcf_b.description: Second annotated or normalized VCF input.

min_impact.description: Minimum impact tier to keep (`LOW`, `MODERATE`, or `HIGH`).

status.description: Status label written into the export rows.

header_case.description: Header case for the CSV (`upper` or `lower`).

dedupe_by_gene.description: Whether to keep only one row per gene.

skills.when_to_use: Use to build a shared-variant CSV from two annotated or normalized VCF inputs
skills.when_not_to_use: Do not use when the workflow still needs annotation, normalization, or comparison setup first

skills.name: sniffles_sv_call
skills.description: Call structural variants from aligned long-read BAM or CRAM data with Sniffles.

reference_fasta.description: Reference FASTA path.

input_bam.description: Coordinate-sorted long-read BAM or CRAM input.

sample_id.description: Optional sample identifier to embed in the output VCF.

min_support.description: Minimum supporting-read count required per variant call.

skills.when_to_use: Use for long-read structural-variant calling from an aligned BAM or CRAM against a matching reference
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for SNP or small-indel calling, or for raw reads that have not already been aligned

skills.name: snpeff_annotate
skills.description: Annotate variants with predicted functional impact via SnpEff.

reference_fasta.description: Optional reference FASTA used to build a custom SnpEff database.

annotation_gff.description: Optional GFF/GFF3 annotation used to build a custom SnpEff database.

config_dir.description: Optional working directory for custom SnpEff database/config generation.

genome_label.description: Optional display label for a custom SnpEff genome entry.

codon_table.description: Optional codon table name for custom-database builds.

check_protein.description: Whether to enable protein validation for custom-database builds.

check_cds.description: Whether to enable CDS validation for custom-database builds.

skills.when_to_use: Use for variant functional annotation to predict impact of SNPs/indels on genes
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for variant calling (use GATK/FreeBayes) or clinical annotation (use VEP)

skills.name: spades_assemble
skills.description: Assemble short-read genomes/transcriptomes with SPAdes.

meta_mode.description: Enable metaSPAdes mode for metagenomic assemblies.

isolate_mode.description: Enable SPAdes isolate mode for microbial isolate genomes.

phred_offset.description: FASTQ PHRED quality offset. Defaults to 33; set to 64 only for legacy PHRED+64 reads, or auto to use SPAdes auto-detection.

skills.when_to_use: Use for de novo short-read genome assembly of bacterial/small genomes
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for long reads (use Flye) or large eukaryotic genomes

skills.name: spatial_transcriptomics_workflow
skills.description: Run a deterministic processed-input spatial transcriptomics workflow on an AnnData spatial dataset.

script_path.description: Optional path to a custom spatial workflow script. Defaults to the bundled deterministic workflow.

output_dir.description: Output directory for canonical spatial result artifacts.

domain_assignments_csv.description: Optional explicit path for the domain-assignment CSV.

marker_genes_csv.description: Optional explicit path for the marker-gene CSV.

results_h5ad.description: Optional explicit path for the processed output AnnData file.

min_genes.description: Minimum detected genes per retained spot.

min_cells.description: Minimum expressing spots per retained gene.

n_hvgs.description: Maximum number of variable genes retained for clustering.

n_pcs.description: Maximum number of expression PCs retained before spatial fusion.

skills.when_to_use: Use for processed Visium-style or AnnData spatial transcriptomics inputs with spot coordinates already present.
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for raw FASTQ/image preprocessing or Space Ranger-style reconstruction from raw Visium data.

skills.name: star_2pass_align
skills.description: Run STAR two-pass alignment mode for improved novel junction detection.

reference_fasta.description: Reference FASTA used to build the STAR genome directory if it does not already exist.

annotation_gtf.description: Gene annotation GTF used to build the STAR genome directory if it does not already exist.

star_index_cache_root.description: Optional STAR index cache root used when materializing a genome dir.

sjdb_overhang.description: Optional sjdbOverhang used for STAR genomeGenerate.

skills.when_to_use: Use for STAR 2-pass alignment for improved novel junction detection in RNA-seq
skills.when_not_to_use: Not needed for routine RNA-seq; use single-pass STAR for speed

skills.name: star_align
skills.description: Align RNA-seq reads to reference genome using STAR.

reference_fasta.description: Reference FASTA used to build the STAR genome directory if it does not already exist.

annotation_gtf.description: Gene annotation GTF used to build the STAR genome directory if it does not already exist.

star_index_cache_root.description: Optional STAR index cache root used when materializing a genome dir.

sjdb_overhang.description: Optional sjdbOverhang used for STAR genomeGenerate.

skills.when_to_use: Use for splice-aware RNA-seq read alignment to a reference genome
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for DNA-seq alignment (use BWA/bowtie2) or long reads (use minimap2)

skills.name: star_solo_count
skills.description: Run STARsolo for single-cell alignment and UMI counting.

reference_fasta.description: Reference FASTA used to build the STAR genome directory if it does not already exist.

annotation_gtf.description: Gene annotation GTF used to build the STAR genome directory if it does not already exist.

star_index_cache_root.description: Optional STAR index cache root used when materializing a genome dir.

sjdb_overhang.description: Optional sjdbOverhang used for STAR genomeGenerate.

skills.when_to_use: Use for single-cell RNA-seq counting with STARsolo as CellRanger alternative
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for bulk RNA-seq alignment or pre-processed single-cell data

skills.name: stringtie_quant
skills.description: Quantify expression from aligned RNA-seq BAMs with StringTie.

output_gtf.description: Output GTF with assembled or quantified transcripts.

estimate_reference_only.description: Restrict estimates to reference transcripts with `-e`.

skills.when_to_use: Use for alignment-based transcript expression estimation and guided transcript reconstruction from RNA-seq BAM files
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for raw FASTQ pseudoalignment quantification when Salmon or kallisto is sufficient

skills.name: subread_align
skills.description: Align paired-end reads with the Subread suite using Subjunc/Subread and produce a sorted indexed BAM.

index_base.description: Alignment index basename to use at runtime.

reference_fasta.description: Reference FASTA used to build the Subread index if needed.

skills.when_to_use: Use for fast short-read alignment as an alternative to BWA/bowtie2
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for spliced alignment (use STAR) or long reads (use minimap2)

skills.name: tabix_index_run
skills.description: Build one tabix index for a bgzipped genomic file as a single atomic step.

force.description: Whether to pass `-f` and overwrite an existing index.

skills.when_to_use: Use to index a bgzipped VCF, GFF, or BED file with tabix
skills.when_not_to_use: Do not use when the file still needs compression or other upstream transformations first

skills.name: tblastn_search
skills.description: Run TBLASTN protein-to-translated-nucleotide search and emit tabular hits.

database.description: BLAST nucleotide database name/path or subject FASTA.

db_gencode.description: Optional genetic code for database translation.

skills.when_to_use: Use when protein queries need to be searched against translated nucleotide databases
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for direct protein-vs-protein searches (use blastp) or nucleotide-vs-nucleotide searches (use blastn)

skills.name: tblastx_search
skills.description: Run TBLASTX translated nucleotide-to-translated-nucleotide search and emit tabular hits.

database.description: BLAST nucleotide database name/path or subject FASTA.

query_gencode.description: Optional genetic code for query translation.

db_gencode.description: Optional genetic code for database translation.

skills.when_to_use: Use when translated nucleotide queries need to be searched against translated nucleotide databases
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for direct nucleotide-vs-nucleotide searches (use blastn) or direct protein-vs-protein searches (use blastp)

skills.name: trinity_assemble
skills.description: Assemble transcriptomes de novo with Trinity.
skills.when_to_use: Use for de novo transcriptome assembly from RNA-seq reads without a reference genome
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for genome assembly (use SPAdes/Flye) or when a reference is available

skills.name: varscan_call
skills.description: Call germline variants from a BAM using VarScan2 mpileup2cns.

reference_fasta.description: Reference FASTA.

skills.when_to_use: Use for variant calling with VarScan2, suitable for tumor/normal or pooled samples
skills.when_not_to_use: Use GATK HaplotypeCaller for germline best practices or FreeBayes for haplotype-aware calling

skills.name: vep_annotate
skills.description: Annotate variants with Ensembl VEP using either offline cache/database mode or a deterministic local GFF/FASTA reference.

assembly.description: Genome assembly name (e.g. GRCh38) for cache/database mode.

species.description: Species name for VEP. Defaults to homo_sapiens for cache/database mode and custom for local GFF mode.

reference_fasta.description: Reference FASTA for custom local annotation mode.

annotation_gff.description: GFF3 annotation file for deterministic custom-reference annotation mode.

annotation_gtf.description: GTF annotation file for deterministic custom-reference annotation mode.

cache_dir.description: Optional VEP cache directory when using offline cache mode.

use_database.description: Use Ensembl database mode instead of offline cache mode.

skills.when_to_use: Use for clinical-grade variant annotation with Ensembl VEP
skills.when_not_to_use: Not for bacterial/custom genomes (use SnpEff with custom database)
